ValidationRule.description: Only admins can modify certain fields after termination
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
IF( AND(
NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), PRIORVALUE(Status__c)='Terminated', OR($Profile.Name = 'Carmignac - System Administrator', $Profile.Name = 'System Administrator'), NOT(ISCHANGED(OwnerId)), NOT(ISCHANGED(Company__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED( Primary_Rebate_Contact__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED( Rebate_Contact_Company__c )), NOT(ISCHANGED( Email_Distribution_List__c )), NOT(ISCHANGED( PrimaryReallocationContact__c )), NOT(ISCHANGED( ReallocationContactCompany__c )), NOT(ISCHANGED( ReallocationEmailDistributionList__c )), NOT(ISCHANGED( After_Termination_Alterations__c))), true,
IF( AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Terminated'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'Terminated'), $Profile.Name <> 'Carmignac - System Administrator', $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator'
),
true,false))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This agreement is terminated and cannot be modified.
